name: schema
description: JSON Schema definitions for project.json and module.json. The foundation that defines what a valid spec looks like.

requirements.title: Define project schema
requirements.description: JSON Schema for project.json covering name, description, version, requirements, module declarations with inter-module dependencies, and milestones.

requirements.title: Define module schema
requirements.description: JSON Schema for module.json covering requirements (with preq_id), architecture components (with content links), implementation sections (with content links), and data flows.

requirements.title: Embed schemas in binary
requirements.description: Make schemas available programmatically via go:embed so the validator can use them without external file dependencies.

requirements.title: Numeric ID constraints
requirements.description: All IDs are integers >= 1, unique within their containing array. Schema enforces minimum value; uniqueness enforced by validator.

components.name: ProjectSchema
components.description: The project.json JSON Schema definition. Defines the structure for project metadata, requirements, module declarations, and milestones.

components.name: ModuleSchema
components.description: The module.json JSON Schema definition. Defines the structure for module requirements, components, impl_sections, and data_flows.

components.name: SchemaLoader
components.description: Go package that embeds JSON Schema files and exposes them for programmatic use by the validator and other modules.
